---
title: "Inexplosive Boyish Bats"
authors:
  - name: "Unknown"
  - name: "LucaYigit"
    url: "https://github.com/LucaYigit"
  - name: "LeoGoeckelmann"
    url: "https://github.com/LeoGoeckelmann"
authors_links: "Unknown, [LucaYigit](https://github.com/LucaYigit), [LeoGoeckelmann](https://github.com/LeoGoeckelmann)"
rank: 4
---
**Screencast**

<video controls width="100%" style="margin-bottom: 2em;"><source src="group_inexplosive_boyish_bats_screencast.mp4" type="video/mp4"></video>
**Ausarbeitung**

<iframe src="Projekt_Facebook.html" loading="lazy" width="100%" height="1200" style="border:0"></iframe>
